description: Extract all camera products from Amazon and sort them by price in ascending order.
List all used camera listings from eBay and filter out those with a 'Buy It Now' option.
Identify and list countries with a negative population growth rate from Wikipedia.
Extract the top 10 IMDb movies and sort them by the number of votes they received.
List all climate datasets from Kaggle that have been updated in the last 6 months.
Find and list GitHub data analysis repositories that have been updated in the past month.
Identify and list the top 5 trending Twitter topics based on the number of tweets.
Extract and list Reddit data science hot posts with more than 100 upvotes.
Filter LinkedIn data analyst job postings for senior-level positions only.
List Stack Overflow Python questions with more than 1000 views.
Sort major city weather forecasts by humidity levels in ascending order.
Find Zillow home listings with at least 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms.
List Google Finance stocks with a positive change in price.
Extract ESPN NBA team standings and sort by wins in descending order.
List all Booking.com hotels with a rating of 8.0 or higher.
Find Yelp restaurants that offer delivery services.
Extract the top 10 cryptocurrencies by market cap from CoinMarketCap.
List Goodreads bestselling books with a rating higher than 4.5.
Identify Crunchbase AI startups that were founded after 2015.
Extract Product Hunt's featured products with more than 500 upvotes.
Extract and compare the average rating of prime vs non-prime camera products on Amazon.
Identify and list the top 5 most downloaded climate datasets from Kaggle, including their size in MB.
Extract the top 10 cryptocurrencies by market cap and create a pie chart of their market cap distribution.
Compare the number of high-rated (4.0 and above) books by genre from Goodreads.
List used cameras from eBay with a 'Buy It Now' price lower than $500, sorted by condition.
Analyze the trend of stock prices and volume for technology companies from Google Finance.
Identify Reddit data science posts with more than 1000 upvotes and at least 100 comments.
Extract and visualize the growth rate of countries with a population density less than 50 per km² from Wikipedia.
List and sort LinkedIn data analyst job postings by number of applicants in descending order.
Create a chart showing the temperature and humidity for cities with 'Cloudy' or 'Rain' conditions.
Extract the titles and ratings of IMDb movies directed by 'Christopher Nolan' and visualize their rating distribution.
Analyze the win percentage of NBA teams with more than 50 wins, showcasing their win-loss record.
Filter Stack Overflow Python questions with more than 500 views and visualize the count of answers.
Extract and visualize the average price of Yelp restaurants with at least 100 reviews, by category.
List the Zillow home listings with at least 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, sorted by price in ascending order.
Identify the top 5 GitHub repositories for data analysis, ranked by stars.
Create a scatter plot of used camera listings on eBay by current bid and time left, only for cameras in 'Like New' condition.
List Booking.com hotels with a rating over 8.0, sorted by distance from city center in ascending order.

Compare the average prices of used cameras between eBay and Amazon. For eBay, use the 'Buy It Now' prices and for Amazon, use the listed prices. Filter out any listings without a price or with a price of $0. Finally, create a bar chart comparing the average prices on both platforms.

Identify the top 5 most popular GitHub data analysis repositories based on stars. Clean the 'Stars' column to convert it from the 'k' format to a full numeric value, then sort the repositories by stars in descending order. Finally, create a table listing these top 5 repositories with their Repo Name, Stars, and Language.
Merge camera listings from Amazon and eBay, standardize price formats, and create a visualization of average price by brand.
Compare the growth rate of countries from Wikipedia by population density, clean data formats, and visualize the top 10.
Aggregate top IMDb movies and Goodreads bestselling books by year, visualize the count of top-rated (above 4.0) movies and books per year.
Create a comprehensive dataset of data analysis GitHub repositories and Kaggle datasets, focusing on Python language, including a calculation of popularity metrics.
Analyze stock market trends from Google Finance by cleaning data formats and visualizing the change in stock prices and volume over time.
Merge job postings from LinkedIn with trending technologies on Twitter to identify market demand, clean data, and visualize job counts by technology.
Create a combined dataset of cryptocurrencies and stock prices, clean formatting issues, and calculate a new 'market momentum' metric for analysis.
Analyze and visualize the correlation between the weather conditions and popularity of restaurants on Yelp in major cities.
Merge real estate listings from Zillow with local weather data, clean and prepare data for analysis, and identify correlations between weather conditions and home prices.
Combine hotel ratings from Booking.com with Yelp restaurant ratings in tourist cities, clean data, and create an index for tourist satisfaction.
